titleStmt.title: SII 15.617: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 617. (B.K. No. 179 of 1928-29.) UMTAR, BADAMI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a hero-stone in the ruined temple.
This is dated Śaka 1208, Pārthiva, Chaitra śu. 11, Sunday, corresponding to 1285 A.D., March 18. The Śaka year was current.

It records a gift of land in Hosavura by Mahāpradhāna Rāvaḷadēva-nāyaka, the Sarvādhikāri of Toṟagale-nāḍu and Bāgaḍe-nāḍu, at the instance of Sarvādhikāri Dhāmoi Rāṇe, when Bachai-[nā*]yaka, son of Rājai-nāyaka, was serving as a subordinate official. The gift appears to have been made in memory of a warrior who died in a fight. These details, however, are not stated clearly in the epigraph.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatsakavaruṣa . 1208 ne pra¨rtti saṁvuvatsara . caitra sū
11 A . śrīmatsa¨rvvādhikāri . dhāmō[I]rāṇeya

© na nirūpadiṁda śrīmahāpradhānaṁ toṟagaleyanāḍa bāgaḍenāḍa
sa¨rvvādhikāri rāvaḷadēvanāyakarū rājaināykara maga bacaināykanu
Āḷutanava māḍidali hosavurastaḷadali sa¨rvvamānyavāgi

koṭṭa bhūmi hatu koḷaga ḷuvereya mēṇi vṛddhigoḷaga ko 1 gaḷakke sollage
dakke sū 1 . Avagegalanu Ayada mādura . haḷiya haṁnissāyira koṭṭa
koṭṭaru . yiṁtī mānyavāgi koṭṭa kaiyi mānya maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 15.617 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
